---
title: "Rania's version"
output:
  html_document: default
  pdf_document: default
---

```{r, include=FALSE}
knitr::opts_chunk$set(echo = TRUE)
```

## R Markdown

This is an R Markdown document. Markdown is a simple formatting syntax for authoring HTML, PDF, and MS Word documents. For more details on using R Markdown see <http://rmarkdown.rstudio.com>.

When you click the **Knit** button a document will be generated that includes both content as well as the output of any embedded R code chunks within the document. You can embed an R code chunk like this:

```{r cars}
summary(cars)
```

## Including Plots

You can also embed plots, for example:

```{r pressure, echo=FALSE}
plot(pressure)
```

Note that the `echo = FALSE` parameter was added to the code chunk to prevent printing of the R code that generated the plot.
---
title: "Assignment 1"
output: html_document
---

```{r , include=FALSE}
knitr::opts_chunk$set(echo = TRUE)
```

## R Markdown

## loading packages
```{r load packages, message=FALSE}
library(sf)
library(tidyverse)
library(ggspatial)
library(ggthemes)

```

## loading datasets
```{r}
CommunityCenters <- st_read("https://bostonopendata-boston.opendata.arcgis.com/datasets/acedd06b39854088b0f2fefccffebf84_0.kml?outSR=%7B%22latestWkid%22%3A3857%2C%22wkid%22%3A102100%7D", quiet = TRUE)

Foodtrucks <- st_read("https://bostonopendata-boston.opendata.arcgis.com/datasets/437d8cb34b58481b9d7b07ea88912b0c_0.kml?outSR=%7B%22latestWkid%22%3A3857%2C%22wkid%22%3A102100%7D", quiet = TRUE)

Openspace <- st_read("https://bostonopendata-boston.opendata.arcgis.com/datasets/2868d370c55d4d458d4ae2224ef8cddd_7.kml", quiet = TRUE)

nhoods <- st_read("https://bostonopendata-boston.opendata.arcgis.com/datasets/3525b0ee6e6b427f9aab5d0a1d0a1a28_0.geojson?outSR=%7B%22latestWkid%22%3A2249%2C%22wkid%22%3A102686%7D", quiet = TRUE)
```


## Plotting multiple layers
```{r}
ggplot(Openspace) +
  geom_sf(fill = "lightgreen", color = "NA") +
  geom_sf(data = CommunityCenters, color = "red", size = 0.8, shape = 16, alpha = 0.5) + 
  geom_sf(data=Foodtrucks, color = "blue", size= 0.3, shape = 4) +
  geom_sf(data = nhoods, fill = "NA", color = "gray")
```

## Modifying the theme 
```{r}
ggplot(Openspace) +
  geom_sf(fill = "lightgreen", color = "darkgreen", size = 0.05) +
  geom_sf(data = CommunityCenters, color = "red", size = 0.8, shape = 16, alpha = 0.5) + 
  geom_sf(data=Foodtrucks, color = "blue", size= 0.01, shape = 4) + 
   geom_sf(data = nhoods, fill = "NA", color = "gray") 
```

## Adding Legend
```{r}
ggplot(Openspace) +
  geom_sf(fill = "lightgreen", size = 0.05, 
          aes(color = "Open Space")) +
  geom_sf(data = CommunityCenters, size = 0.8, shape = 16, alpha = 0.5, 
          aes(fill = "Community Centers")) + 
  geom_sf(data=Foodtrucks, size= 0.01, shape = 4, 
          aes(fill = "Food Trucks")) +
  geom_sf(data = nhoods, fill = "NA", color = "gray") 
  
```

## Dark background map
```{r}
ggplot(Openspace) +
  annotation_map_tile(zoomin = 0, progress = "none", type = "cartodark")  +
    geom_sf(fill = "lightgreen", color = "darkgreen", size = 0.05, 
          aes(fill = "Open Space")) +
  geom_sf(data = CommunityCenters, color = "red", size = 0.8, shape = 16, alpha = 0.5, 
          aes(color = "Community Centers")) + 
  geom_sf(data=Foodtrucks, color = "blue", size= 0.01, shape = 4, 
          aes(color = "Food Trucks")) +
  geom_sf(data = nhoods, fill = "NA", color = "gray", size = 0.1) +
  scale_color_manual(values = "lightgreen", name = "Open Space") +
  labs(caption = "Map tiles and data by OpenStreetMap")
```
```{r}
